allies.rationale_text: Confidence-calibration gives dunning-kruger-effect the practical measurement discipline needed to compare self-belief against actual performance.
allies.source_quote: Calibration: regularly use objective instruments like quizzes, practice tests, or external review processes.

allies.rationale_text: Intellectual-humility helps dunning-kruger-effect create the mindset needed to admit what is not yet known well enough.
allies.source_quote: The essential antidotes are radical open-mindedness and humility.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Dunning-kruger-effect conflicts with confidence-calibration when awareness of the effect causes competent individuals to systematically underweight their own expertise.
structured_tensions.source_quote: dunning-kruger-effect conflicts with confidence-calibration (confidence calibration) when awareness of the effect causes competent individuals to systematically underweight their own expertise.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Dunning-kruger-effect conflicts with authority-bias when perceived expertise is granted to the confidently incompetent while genuinely skilled individuals defer unnecessarily.
structured_tensions.source_quote: dunning-kruger-effect conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when perceived expertise is granted to the confidently incompetent while genuinely skilled individuals defer unnecessarily.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved the strongest calibration and humility allies to keep the first-order surface on evidence-bearing skill checks.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader System 1/System 2 and guru-effect sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: Feynman-technique is source-real nearby, but the current first-order surface is cleanest around confidence-calibration and intellectual-humility.
